scripts.bootstrap: npm run bootstrap:apps && npm run bootstrap:packages
scripts.bootstrap:apps: npm --prefix apps/api install && npm --prefix apps/web install && npm --prefix apps/bot install && npm --prefix apps/worker install && npm --prefix apps/cdn install
scripts.bootstrap:packages: npm --prefix packages/config install && npm --prefix packages/logger install && npm --prefix packages/schemas install && npm --prefix packages/clients install && npm --prefix packages/security install && npm --prefix packages/analytics install && npm --prefix packages/ui install
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:worker && npm run build:bot && npm run build:web && npm run build:cdn
